scripts.db:migrate:local: CI=1 npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.db:migrate:next: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env next --remote
scripts.start: npm run db:migrate:local && npx wrangler dev
scripts.dev: npm run db:migrate:local && npx wrangler dev
scripts.test:worker:extended: RUN_EXTENDED_WORKER_TESTS=1 vitest run --config vitest.config.worker.ts test/worker/game-room.test.ts -t "runs a full 10-game lifecycle and emits match_over"
scripts.deploy: sh -c 'set -e; cleanup(){ npm run unstamp-build; }; trap cleanup EXIT; npm run stamp-build; npx wrangler deploy; trap - EXIT; cleanup'
scripts.deploy:next: sh -c 'set -e; cleanup(){ npm run unstamp-build; }; trap cleanup EXIT; npm run stamp-build; npx wrangler deploy --env next; trap - EXIT; cleanup'
